{
  "name": "MCRCase",
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "case_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Auto-generated or custom Case ID"
    },
    "assigned_counselor": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Assigned counselor name"
    },
    "benefit_period_start_date": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "date",
      "description": "Benefit Period Start Date (derived)"
    },
    "benefit_period_category": {
      "type": "string",
      "enum": [
        "Deductible Days",
        "Coinsurance Days",
        "Lifetime Reserve Days",
        "Beyond Lifetime Reserve Days"
      ],
      "description": "Benefit period category at time of entry"
    },
    "days_remaining_at_entry": {
      "type": "integer",
      "minimum": 0,
      "description": "Days remaining in the benefit period at time of entry"
    },
    "admission_date": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "date",
      "description": "Admission Date (required)"
    },
    "discharge_date": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "date",
      "description": "Discharge Date (optional)"
    },
    "last_census_verified": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "date",
      "description": "Date of last census verification"
    },
    "lrd_previously_used": {
      "type": "integer",
      "minimum": 0,
      "default": 0,
      "description": "Lifetime Reserve Days previously used"
    },
    "form_status": {
      "type": "string",
      "enum": [
        "Not Needed",
        "Pending",
        "Signed Opt-In",
        "Signed Opt-Out"
      ],
      "default": "Not Needed",
      "description": "LRD form status"
    },
    "form_given_date": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "date",
      "description": "Date form was given to patient"
    },
    "form_returned_date": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "date",
      "description": "Date form was returned"
    },
    "form_uploaded": {
      "type": "string",
      "enum": [
        "Yes",
        "No",
        ""
      ],
      "default": "",
      "description": "Whether the form has been uploaded"
    },
    "verified_by": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Staff initials of verifier"
    },
    "case_status": {
      "type": "string",
      "enum": [
        "Active",
        "Closed",
        "Archived"
      ],
      "default": "Active",
      "description": "Case workflow status"
    },
    "still_inpatient": {
      "type": "string",
      "enum": [
        "Yes",
        "No",
        ""
      ],
      "default": "",
      "description": "Whether patient is still inpatient"
    },
    "notes": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Operational notes only \u2014 NO PHI"
    }
  },
  "required": [
    "admission_date"
  ],
  "rls": {
    "read": {},
    "write": {}
  }
}
